sections.name: General Appearance
items: Is the Silicon Sealer Machine visually in good condition and clean.
Is the area around the Silicon Sealer Machine free from any obstruction.

sections.name: Mechanical / Electrical
items: Where Applicable are Electrical Cabinets free from Dust.

sections.name: Safety
items: Sufficient Silicone in machine for operation.
Is there are Risk Assessment in place for the operation.
Is appropriate PPE Available and worn at all times.
